---
name: help_comments
description: update class or help comments to reflect current code
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Be concise, but accurate. Update class or help comments to reflect current code. Do not add any information that is not supported by the code. Do not remove any information that is supported by the code. Do not reference functions that are built-in to MATLAB. Give a brief description of the class or function, its purpose, and any important details about its behavior or usage. Add today's date to the end of the comments. Give syntax examples if appropriate.
